all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment: thou shalt not respect the person of the poor, nor honour the person of the mighty: but in righteousness shalt thou judge thy neighbour.
Leviticus 19:15
Quote of the Day
"The counsel “look to God and live” not only has meaning for us in eternity but also makes all the difference in … our mortal lives."
President D. Todd Christofferson | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
